---
title: "New Blog Post: Qualpal: Python Package, Revised CVD Handling, and White Point References"
date: 2026-01-30
description: |
  I have published [a new blog post](/blog/2026-01-30-qualpal-python-package-revised-cvd-handling) titled "Qualpal: Python Package, Revised CVD Handling, and White Point References".
  Check it out!
---
